name: Celery Salad
recipeInstructions:
- Combine the celery, carrot, and onion in a bowl.
- In a separate small bowl, mix together the salad dressing, prepared mustard, vinegar, and pepper until well combined.
- Pour the mixture over the celery and carrot mixture.
- Stir gently to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
- Serve 2 servings of about 2/3 cup each.
60 calories per serving.
